message: No unit test failures found on main (HEAD: ff9ea5463). All 5 pages of check runs were inspected (495 total). CI pipeline failures detected were infrastructure issues: openai "Build Build" failed due to missing CI staging path (not a code bug, RunUnitTests=false); alertprocessingrules "Build UnitTest" had 3/3 tests passing but Cmd.exe exit 255 post-test; computelimit "Build Analyze" had PowerShell exit 1 in an analyze step. Live-test failures (communication-short-codes, storage-blob, communication-identity) were filtered out per workflow rules. No GitHub issue created.
